name: The Cypress Hills Massacre
author: Kinky Joe & Maxsaurus
bootlegger: If Legion is summoned, all evil players and the majority of all players become evil Legion.
If the Knight has their ability, the players they have seen cannot become the Demon.
If a player is mad that the Wraith is the Wraith, they might die.
If a Fang Gu is summoned, a player might become an Outsider.
